summary: Per-pixel structure tensor of an Image or Field1: central-difference gradients at a gradient scale, the per-channel outer-product summed, then Gaussian-smoothed at an integration scale; output is the symmetric tensor's (Jxx, Jxy, Jyy) as a Field3.

inputs.name: input
inputs.doc: The Image or Field1 to analyze (channels summed for the colour tensor).

outputs.name: tensor
outputs.doc: The structure tensor's three independent entries (Jxx, Jxy, Jyy) per pixel.

params.name: gradient_sigma
params.doc: Pre-smoothing applied before differentiation; 0 differentiates the raw input.

params.name: integration_sigma
params.doc: Gaussian smoothing applied to the outer-product components (the window orientation is averaged over).

perceptual.reason: filter.structure_tensor is a closed-form local-geometry summary verified by analytic tensor properties (oriented-grating tensor direction, constant/isotropic degeneracy, 90-degree rotation covariance of the (Jxx, Jxy, Jyy) entries); there is no perceptual-quality metric to apply
